title: Hiring Production Engineer at Rahu Catalysts Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Hiring Production Engineer at Rahu Catalysts Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Rahu Catalysts Asia Pacific Associates has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Bengaluru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Rahu Catalysts Asia Pacific Associates:
Rahu Catalysts Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rahu Catalysts Asia Pacific Associates!
